# Pass Culture Data Documentation

> Documentation for Pass Culture's data repository, providing insights and resources for cultural accessibility projects.

Documentation for Pass Culture's data repository: dbt data models, KPIs, glossary, and data engineering/science references.

## Platform

- [Repository structure](https://pass-culture.github.io/data-gcp/project_structure_and_data_flow/index.md)

## Data Models

- [Overview](https://pass-culture.github.io/data-gcp/dbt/overview/index.md)
- [Vidoc KPIs](https://pass-culture.github.io/data-gcp/dbt/vidoc_kpis/index.md)
- [Active beneficiaries](https://pass-culture.github.io/data-gcp/dbt/vidoc_kpis/active_beneficiaries/index.md)
